name: Chiles Rellenos Casserole W/Marinara
recipeIngredient: 4 lbs Jack cheese, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Stuff the chilies with Jack cheese.
2. Arrange the stuffed chilies side-by-side in a greased shallow 1 1/2 qt. baking dish.
3. In a bowl, beat eggs until thick and foamy. Gradually add milk, flour, and baking powder, stirring to combine.
4. Pour the egg batter over the chilies, ensuring all are covered.
5. Sprinkle with grated cheddar cheese.
6. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 30 minutes or until set.
7. Serve with heated marinara sauce and olives.
Note: The recipe can be doubled as needed.
